backend/main.mo: Main actor defining user profiles, health data, and emergency contacts with Map-based storage, integrating authorization mixin for access control, and exposing public/shared functions for CRUD operations with permission checks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five completed professional design refinements (typography, layout, emergency contacts, health tracker, and chat interface) with high confidence and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON object containing concise summaries of all frontend files, describing their professional styling, component responsibilities, and React Query hook implementations.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including comprehensive design tokens for backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, 'Health Guardian' title, root div, and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component managing authentication flow with Internet Identity, conditional rendering of login, profile setup, or main layout based on auth and profile state, with loading indicators.
frontend/src/components/EmergencyContact: Emergency contacts management component with professional card-based UI displaying existing contacts in a directory layout and a form to add new contacts with name, relationship, and phone fields.
frontend/src/components/HealthChatInterf: A chat interface component that displays a conversation with an AI health assistant, providing simulated responses to common health queries about hydration, exercise, sleep, diet, and stress management.
frontend/src/components/HealthRoutineTra: A form component for tracking daily health metrics including exercise minutes, meals, water intake, sleep hours, and medications, with display of current health data and dynamic field management.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main application layout component with header, hero section, and tabbed navigation between Health Tracker, AI Assistant, and Emergency contacts sections.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: A button component that handles Internet Identity authentication, toggling between login and logout states with loading indicators and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: An onboarding component that displays a form for new users to enter their name and create their initial profile.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling authentication state changes and initializing access control with admin tokens.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddEmergencyContac: A mutation hook for adding emergency contacts to the backend, with success/error toast notifications and automatic query invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: A query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetEmergencyContac: A query hook that fetches emergency contacts for a specific user principal from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetHealthData.ts: A query hook that fetches health data for a specific user principal from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useLogHealthData.ts: React Query mutation hook for logging health data via the backend actor, with automatic cache invalidation and toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook for saving user profile data via the backend actor, invalidating the current user profile query on success.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for a professional health-focused theme, including light/dark mode color palettes using OKLCH color space and typography settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH, typography settings with Inter font, professional shadows, and animation utilities.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting the AI health assistant application architecture, implemented features (authentication, health tracking, AI chat, emergency contacts), and design requirements for a professional health-focused UI.
